pain_point: Highly trained CPAs spending too much time on manual data extraction from unstructured client documents rather than focusing on high-value advisory work.
draft_email: I saw on your About Us page that Sweeney Conrad consistently ranks as a 'Best Place to Work' in Washington by putting 'People First'. To maintain that strong culture while scaling your advisory and tax practices, ensuring your highly-trained CPAs aren't bogged down by the manual extraction of data from complex client documents is likely a priority. Our Universal Document Analysis platform can automatically process and categorize these unstructured documents, freeing your staff from tedious data entry so they can focus on high-value client relationships.
